macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US Stock Indexes Rebound Around 1% Amid Oil Price Recovery and Strait of Hormuz Tanker Crossings
items.summary: Major US indexes including Dow Jones, S&P 500, and Nasdaq rose approximately 1% on March 16, driven by a better oil outlook following successful tanker crossings through the Strait of Hormuz. Tech and finance sectors led gains, with Nasdaq and S&P 500 forming tight bull channels around key support levels.

items.title: Tech Sector Faces AI Trade Unraveling and Valuation Uncertainty, Treasury Secretary Warns of Market Panic Risks
items.summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent highlighted compromised price discovery in AI stocks as a deeper issue than selloffs, with Nvidia's stock falling despite strong earnings and Magnificent 7 down 7% YTD. Private credit markets financing AI infrastructure show signs of stress, including recent firm bankruptcies and withdrawal restrictions.

items.title: Several Companies Report Strong Q4 Earnings Beats on March 16
items.summary: Dollar Tree beat Q4 estimates with sales growth from higher comparable sales; other firms like IHS Towers (+476% EPS surprise), TLS (+200%), and RFIL (+100%) exceeded expectations. Upcoming earnings from Williams-Sonoma in focus amid Q1 season start.

items.title: Bitcoin Surges to $73,882, Up Over $2,300 in 24 Hours Amid Positive Economic Sentiment
items.summary: Bitcoin price reached $73,882.25 at 9:15 a.m. ET on March 16, marking a $2,327 increase from the prior day, influenced by investor speculation and broader economic strength rather than direct Fed sensitivity.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Price Surges Above $75,000 Amid Market Rally
items.summary: Bitcoin climbed above $75,000, marking its strongest level since early February with a nearly 25% rebound from February lows, driven by improving global risk appetite and easing geopolitical tensions. Ethereum rose past $2,360 with 8.47% gains, while total crypto market cap neared $2.59 trillion ahead of the FOMC meeting.[2][5]

items.title: Strategy Adds 22,337 Bitcoin to Holdings for $1.57 Billion
items.summary: MicroStrategy, led by Michael Saylor, purchased 22,337 more Bitcoin, increasing total holdings to 761,068 BTC valued at around $50 billion, signaling strong corporate demand. Metaplanet secured $255 million from investors to boost its Bitcoin treasury strategy.[5]

items.title: 20 Millionth Bitcoin Mined as Supply Milestone Reached
items.summary: The Bitcoin network mined its 20 millionth BTC, highlighting ongoing supply constraints with over 95% of total supply now issued ahead of future halvings.[6]

items.title: Crypto Rally Tracks Equity Strength Ahead of FOMC Decision
items.summary: Cryptocurrency markets mirrored a U.S. equity rebound with Bitcoin dominance at 58.76%, as investors eye the Federal Reserve's policy announcement for signals on rates and inflation.[2]

items.title: U.S. SEC and CFTC Align on Crypto Regulation
items.summary: The U.S. SEC and CFTC reached alignment on cryptocurrency oversight, potentially providing clearer regulatory frameworks to encourage institutional participation.[6]

items.title: TRUMP Token Rallies on Mar-a-Lago VIP Event Announcement
items.summary: The TRUMP memecoin surged following news of a new VIP event at Mar-a-Lago, boosting sentiment amid broader crypto market recovery.[6]

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Optimal Blue Launches Virtual Economist AI Assistant
items.summary: Optimal Blue introduced the Virtual Economist, a first-of-its-kind AI assistant combining generative AI with proprietary machine learning models on real-time economic data to answer complex mortgage and economic questions. The company has deployed over 12 AI agents to enhance mortgage professionals' efficiency without replacing staff.

items.title: Luiss University Partners with Google to Integrate AI Across Campus
items.summary: Luiss Guido Carli University in Italy announced a collaboration with Google to embed AI tools in teaching, research, and operations, including redesigning courses for AI-enabled environments and developing digital skills.

items.title: Artificial Superintelligence Alliance (FET) Surges 70.5% Amid AI Rally
items.summary: The decentralized machine learning platform Artificial Superintelligence Alliance (FET) gained 70.5% as the AI sector rallied, highlighting strong market interest in AI technologies.

items.title: AI Demand Drives Ruthenium Prices to Record Highs
items.summary: Rising demand for ruthenium in AI hardware has pushed prices to unprecedented 2026 highs, reflecting the material's critical role in modern computing advancements.

items.title: OpenClaw Incident Reveals Security Risks in Agentic AI
items.summary: The OpenClaw event exposed hidden security and compliance risks in experimental agentic AI tools, emphasizing the need for caution in their deployment.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 and Dispatch Lead BAFTA Game Awards 2026 Nominations
items.summary: Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 topped the BAFTA Game Awards 2026 with 12 nominations, including Best Game, while Dispatch received nine. Other nominees include Arc Raiders, Ghost of Yotei, and Indiana Jones and the Great Circle.

items.title: GDC 2026 Highlights Gaming Industry Crisis with High Job Seekers, AI Rise, and Outsourcing Surge
items.summary: The 2026 Game Developers Conference showed record job seekers amid ongoing layoffs, heavy AI tool promotions for automating game development tasks, and unprecedented outsourcing activity. The industry has lost over 30,000 positions since 2023.

items.title: ASUS Unveils Liquid-Cooled AI Infrastructure with NVIDIA Vera Rubin at GTC 2026
items.summary: ASUS launched a fully liquid-cooled AI POD powered by NVIDIA Vera Rubin NVL72 at NVIDIA GTC 2026, targeting high-performance AI clusters for enterprises with applications in gaming and visual computing.

items.title: US Court Orders Krafton to Reinstate Studio Head After AI-Generated Takeover Plan
items.summary: A Delaware court ruled that South Korean gaming firm Krafton must reinstate the head of Unknown Worlds Entertainment, finding the removal improper and based on a ChatGPT-generated takeover strategy in a $250 million dispute.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: AI Investment Boom Revives Forgotten Tech Sectors
items.summary: Venture capital is surging back into healthtech, cybersecurity, biotech, and SaaS, with cybersecurity deals hitting a record $643.1 million in Q4 2025. Function Health raised $300 million at a $2.5 billion valuation, while AI-powered security companies like 7AI and Vega Security secured major Series A funding.

items.title: FY 2027 H-1B Cap Registration Reaches Midpoint Under New Wage-Weighted System
items.summary: U.S. employers are halfway through the filing window for the new wage-weighted H-1B visa selection system that replaced the random lottery in February 2026. The system assigns selection weights based on offered wage levels, with registration closing March 19 at noon ET.

items.title: Bitcoin Price Rises $2,327 in Single Day
items.summary: Bitcoin reached $73,882.25 on March 16, marking a $2,327.34 increase from the previous day, though it remains approximately $8,700 below its price one year ago.

items.title: Eloro Resources Increases Cartier Silver Stake to 11.85%
items.summary: Eloro Resources Ltd. completed open-market purchases of Cartier Silver Corporation shares for C$218,290 at prices between C$0.17 and C$0.21 per share, filing an Early Warning Report with regulators.
